name: react-pdf (renderer)

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing PDF when you are already in the React component model and need to reliably generate a multi-page PDF preview or file from a Document/Page/View/Text tree, because native implementations fail at pagination, font embedding, and the PDF-specific flex-style subset; not for web DOM screenshots, rich-text editors, or arbitrary CSS printing.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot generate PDF bytes, paginate and reflow, control widows/orphans, or embed fonts by default, and often applies browser CSS incorrectly to react-pdf's restricted style set; the upstream component tree exposes these capabilities through native React interfaces.

data_in.note: The input is a runtime React element tree, not a new JSON DSL; the root must be Document, its direct children may only be Page, and ordinary strings may only appear inside Text.

children.children: ReactElement<typeof View | Text | Image | Link | Svg>[]
children.style_note: Style is a react-pdf style object (numeric pt values and supported flex/text properties), not arbitrary browser CSS

spec.note: PDFViewer creates an internal iframe, so the outer container must have an explicit height; default 640px, overridable by AI. Rule 3 prohibits vh/percentage height. Page.size determines paper size.

when_to_use: 已经在 React 组件模型里并需要把 Document/Page/View/Text 树稳定生成多页 PDF 预览或文件时用它而非手写 PDF，因为原生在分页、字体嵌入和 PDF 专用 flex 样式子集上失败；非做网页 DOM 截图、富文本编辑器或任意 CSS 打印。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到 PDF 字节生成、分页回流、孤行控制和字体嵌入，也常把浏览器 CSS 错套到 react-pdf 的受限样式集；上游组件树把这些能力收敛为 React 原生接口。

data_in.note: 输入是运行时 React element 树，不是另造的 JSON DSL；根必须是 Document，直属子节点只能是 Page，普通字符串只能放在 Text 内。

children.children: ReactElement<typeof View | Text | Image | Link | Svg>[]
children.style_note: Style 是 react-pdf 样式对象（pt 数值与其支持的 flex/text 属性），不是任意浏览器 CSS

spec.note: PDFViewer 内部创建 iframe，外层必须显式 height；默认 640px，AI 可覆盖，铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。纸张尺寸由 Page.size 决定。

boot.codex:
// sandbox iframe:同 artifact，React 19 + createRoot + PDFViewer；容器显式 640px 高。
// 只产文件时可用 pdf(documentNode).toBlob()，无需挂 PDFViewer。

example._why: Document/Page/View/Text 层级和 PDF 专用 style 子集容易与 DOM React 混淆；以可复制的原生 createElement 片段校准。
example.minimal_js: const documentNode = React.createElement(Document, { title:'Report' }, React.createElement(Page, { size:'A4', style:{ padding:40 } }, React.createElement(View, null, React.createElement(Text, { style:{ fontSize:18 } }, 'Report'))));
example.empty_js: const documentNode = React.createElement(Document, null, React.createElement(Page, { size:'A4' }));

children.children: Revenue grew 18% quarter over quarter, led by EMEA expansion.

carriers.widget: conditional:需 React/ReactDOM/@react-pdf 多包 ESM 图、Blob URL 与 iframe；PDFViewer 容器落 shadowRoot，无 head CSS
carriers.codex: supported:浏览器 ESM + React + Blob + iframe；远程 Image/Font.register 另受 img-cdn/font-cdn 策略约束

isolation.evidence: +esm shows no document.head / createElement('style') / adoptedStyleSheets and no document/window addEventListener. PDFViewer renders an <iframe> fed by a Blob URL (URL.createObjectURL; 8x Blob) as its React output inside the mount container -> self-contained, no host CSS footprint; mounts in a shadow container fine.
